title: lepidium meyenii subsp. gelidum
intro: Lepidium meyenii subsp. gelidum, also known as Maca, is a perennial plant native to the Andean region of Peru. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Maca is believed to have adaptogenic properties, helping the body to adapt to stress and promoting balance in the body. The medicinal properties of Lepidium meyenii subsp. gelidum are attributed to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and other nutrients, which can improve fertility, boost energy, and support mental clarity. Herbal preparations of Lepidium meyenii subsp. gelidum include capsules, powders, and teas, which can be consumed daily to support overall health and well-being.
